icon.$description: Layer 1 (locked, universal). Icon to text inline — buttons, breadcrumbs, links.

label.$description: Layer 1 (locked, universal). Label to value within a single field.

selection.$description: Layer 1 (locked, universal). Radio or checkbox to its label.

interactive.$description: Layer 1 (locked, universal). Interactive element to interactive element.

card.$description: Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Between cards in a list or grid.

field.$description: Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Field to field within a form.

section.$description: Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Section to section on a page.

sectionTitle.$description: Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Section heading to body content below it.

action.$description: Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Content group to primary CTA button.

postHero.$description: Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Hero band to first content block.
